# UC-22.12.41 · SOX / ITGC — Cisco ISE Admin Role Change Evidence (Logical Access)

> **Criticality:** Critical &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance

*We continuously evidence SOX ITGC over ISE admin privilege lifecycle. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.*

---

## Description

We continuously evidence SOX ITGC over ISE admin privilege lifecycle.

## Value

ISE admins control who can connect to financially-significant networks. SOX auditors require continuous evidence of admin privilege change with attribution; this UC produces it.

## Implementation

Daily. Forward-only archive — never delete.

## Evidence

Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with SOX AS5 tagging.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Grant a new admin super-admin. Evidence captured within 5 min.

### Negative scenario

No role changes. Empty result.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.71 operational.
- `audit_evidence` with 7y retention (SOX standard).

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.12.41: SOX ITGC — ISE Admin Role Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.12.41,reg=SOX,clause=AS5.B27-B29
```

Quarterly review with SOX auditor.

## SPL

```spl
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (60050, 60051, 60052, 60100) earliest=-1d
| eval sox_clause="AS5.B27-B29", control="Logical_Access_ITGC"
| table _time, admin_user, admin_role, admin_action, source_ip, sox_clause
| collect index=audit_evidence
```

## Visualization

SOX ITGC dashboard: ISE admin role timeline; super-admin grant audit table.

## Known False Positives

1. Bulk role updates during planned admin reorg — annotate with change ticket reference.

## References

- [PCAOB AS 5](https://pcaobus.org/oversight/standards/auditing-standards/details/)
